results.name: cuneiform
results.description: A written language consisting of angular symbols, based on writing on clay tablets with a wedge-shaped stylus.

results.name: cunning
results.description: If X attacks and isn't blocked, you may choose to have it deal damage to another target. If done so, X will deal no combat damage.

results.name: cupping item
results.description: Art that focuses on hands cupping an artifact, as is prominently seen in Volkan Baǵa's moxen, for example.

results.name: curiosity
results.description: Draw cards when dealing damage to an opponent

results.name: curiosity-like
results.description: Cards that can give you some form of card advantage upon dealing damage, usually combat damage, to a player.

results.name: curse guy
results.description: Aka The Unluckiest Planeswalker. Does this guy ever get a break?

results.name: cute
results.description: Cards depicting things that people would typically  consider cute.

results.description: All the cycles from Magic history.
